sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19791" key="beltiw/teros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βελτ-ιώτερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19791.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βελτίων</ref></xr>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0369.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telesill.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
